subcodes.first_line: O My Name Mihdi! The letter of the Afnán, A. and H. - upon him be My glory - which bore thy name hath been laid before Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی مهدی مکتوب افنان الف و حا علیه بهائی که باسم شما بود عبد حاضر لدی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
